title: Confirm your time
subtitle: Appointment with {clinic}
consentData: I authorize the clinic to process my personal and health data for care purposes, in accordance with the Privacy Policy.
consentAnalytics: I authorize the use of my data in anonymized and aggregated form for studies and statistics, without being identified.
privacyNote: Your data is protected under data protection law. Use for statistics is optional, anonymized and can be revoked at any time.
invalidDesc: This confirmation link is invalid, already used or expired. Please request a new one from the clinic.
doneDesc: All set. Your appointment is confirmed:
questionnairesHint: Before your session, please answer the questionnaires below. It takes a few minutes.
